macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Global stocks rise as Middle East tensions ease and oil falls
items.summary: Global shares climbed after reports that U.S.-Iran peace progress reduced fears of supply disruption, while oil prices fell as tanker traffic resumed through the Strait of Hormuz. Reuters said the move also helped ease inflation concerns and supported record highs in Japan and South Korea.

items.title: Japan and South Korea stocks hit record highs on stronger risk sentiment
items.summary: Reuters reported record-setting moves in Japanese and South Korean equities as investors reacted to lower oil prices and improved geopolitical risk appetite. The dollar also strengthened on expectations that the Fed may stay cautious, while the yen remained near four-decade lows.

items.title: Micron earnings expected to test strength of the AI-driven chip rally
items.summary: Reuters said investors are watching upcoming Micron Technology earnings closely for signs that chip demand remains strong. The report frames Micron as a key check on whether the AI-fueled U.S. stock rally still has room to run.

items.title: MDA Space to buy Blue Canyon Technologies for $620 million
items.summary: Canadian space technology firm MDA Space announced it will acquire Blue Canyon Technologies from RTX's Raytheon business for $620 million in cash. Reuters said the deal expands MDA's footprint in the U.S. defense space market.

items.title: Markets watch for central bank signals as Fed policy remains in focus
items.summary: Trading Economics' calendar shows a Fed speech from Goolsbee and a U.S. interest rate decision on the docket, keeping central bank policy in focus for traders. The calendar also lists U.S. jobless claims and final GDP-related releases among the key macro data points.

items.title: U.S. producer prices and jobless claims highlight still-sticky inflation and labor data
items.summary: First Trust Economics Blog highlighted that producer prices rose 1.1% in May, with energy driving much of the increase, while initial jobless claims rose to 229,000 and continuing claims increased to 1.795 million. The blog said the data point to persistent inflation pressures alongside a labor market that is still firm.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Tesla Unveils Genesis ENO: A Game-Changing General-Purpose Robot with 20 DoF Hands
items.summary: Tesla has unveiled Genesis ENO, a new general-purpose robot powered by the GENE AI brain, featuring 20 DoF proprietary hands for human-level dexterous manipulation in manufacturing, logistics, and labs, with production targeted for end-of-2026.

items.title: Sony AI Ace Defeats Elite Human Athletes in Official Table Tennis Matches Using Deep Reinforcement Learning
items.summary: Sony AI's autonomous physical agent ACE has defeated elite human athletes under official ITTF rules using deep reinforcement learning and 3D perception, winning three out of five matches against club athletes and expanding its record against professionals.

items.title: NVIDIA Introduces Motion Bricks: Real-Time Generative Motion Framework for Robotics at 15,000 FPS
items.summary: NVIDIA Research launched Motion Bricks, a real-time generative motion framework replacing rigid animation graphs with a neural backbone, generating physical motion at 15,000 FPS with 2ms latency and modeling 350,000 distinct motion skills simultaneously.

items.title: Anthropic Releases Claude Code Artifacts Update for Developers
items.summary: Anthropic has introduced a new Claude Code Artifacts update designed to enhance developer workflows with improved code generation and integration capabilities.

items.title: Jensen Huang Predicts AI's Workplace Impact Will Be 'Largely Wonderful'
items.summary: NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang praised AI's accessibility and predicted its impact on the workplace will be largely wonderful, emphasizing productivity gains and digital transformation.

items.title: Midjourney Launches Medical Division with Ultrasonic CT Full-Body Scanner
items.summary: Midjourney has launched Midjourney Medical, a new health division introducing the Ultrasonic CT, a full-body scanner using sound and water instead of radiation or magnetic fields for safer imaging.

items.title: Meta Achieves AI Breakthrough: Internal Model Identifies 8,000 Employees Still Active
items.summary: Meta reportedly achieved a major AI breakthrough where an internal model successfully identified 8,000 employees still active, signaling advanced workforce analytics capabilities.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
